overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked, neon-lit dystopian city. The camera traverses an elevated bridge overlooking holographic skyscraper advertisements before descending to street level and navigating through wet urban streets with sparse traffic and occasional pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian bridge overlooking downtown skyline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated bridge while observing the neon-lit skyline and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: tall buildings covered in bright neon signage and holographic displays dominating the skyline
tall cylindrical tower displaying rotating holographic advertisements with a woman's face
metal safety railing with red and white hazard stripes running along the walkway edge
bright red neon sign with Japanese characters mounted on building facade
wet metal grating floor reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian bridge with a panoramic view of a cyberpunk cityscape at night. Neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic advertisements illuminate the foggy atmosphere while the camera moves forward along the wet metal walkway, with safety railings visible in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition ramp from elevated walkway to street level

events.description: descends from elevated bridge down to street level, transitioning from overlook to street walking

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking down the ramp from the bridge to the street level, entering the urban street environment

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking across the street in the distance

entered.detail: lower commercial buildings with illuminated windows and signage at street level
rain-slicked black asphalt street reflecting streetlights and neon signs
tall pole with bright white lamp illuminating the foggy street
vehicles parked along the curb partially visible in the mist

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and descends from the elevated walkway down to street level, transitioning from the panoramic overlook to the urban street environment. Street-level buildings and wet asphalt come into view as the holographic tower shifts to the right side, and a lone pedestrian is visible crossing the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with traffic barriers

events.description: car with headlights on approaches and passes by on the wet road
second vehicle passes by in the opposite direction, headlights reflecting on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a road barrier, observing passing traffic and the neon-lit street

entered.detail: low-rise commercial structures with illuminated windows and signage lining the street
metal guardrail separating the sidewalk from the multi-lane road
tall palm tree silhouetted against the city lights

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet multi-lane city street separated from traffic by a metal barrier, with commercial buildings lining the right side. Vehicles with bright headlights pass by on the rain-slicked road, their lights reflecting off the wet asphalt surface while palm trees are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and construction barriers

events.description: passing by construction barriers and entering area with dense neon signage on right

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street passing commercial establishments with bright neon signs and construction barriers

entered.detail: cluster of bright pink and blue neon signs advertising businesses on the building facade
yellow and black striped barriers blocking off a section of the sidewalk
traffic signal suspended over the intersection ahead
metal scaffolding structure attached to building under construction or renovation

segments.scene_description: The walk continues through a commercial district with vibrant neon storefront signs on the right and construction barriers narrowing the sidewalk. Overhead traffic lights and building scaffolding become visible as the camera moves forward, with the street remaining wet and foggy.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk with construction materials and fencing

events.description: entering construction zone with stacked pallets and debris along the fence line

agents.ego_description: walking past stacked construction materials and trash bags along a chain-link fence in a narrower section of sidewalk

entered.detail: tall stacks of wooden shipping pallets wrapped in plastic along the fence
green chain-link construction fence running along the left side of the path
black garbage bags and debris piled near the fence base
discarded cardboard boxes and packaging materials on the ground

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow construction zone with stacked wooden pallets, chain-link fencing, and trash bags lining the left side. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed as the camera passes the commercial neon signs, focusing on the industrial materials and debris along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high-altitude panoramic overlook down into the rain-slicked depths of a neon-lit urban street. It begins on an elevated pedestrian bridge, moving forward along a wet metal walkway beneath the glow of holographic advertisements and foggy skyscrapers. As the camera turns right, it descends from the bridge to street level, shifting the perspective from the wide cityscape to the immediate surroundings of wet asphalt and towering buildings. The scene then opens onto a multi-lane city street where the camera follows a path separated by metal barriers, passing a lone pedestrian. Finally, the movement continues past commercial buildings and distant palm trees as vehicles with bright headlights glide across the reflective, rain-soaked road.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant commercial district that gradually narrows into a dark, industrial construction zone. It begins by traversing a wet, foggy sidewalk lined with glowing neon storefront signs and overhead traffic lights, while construction barriers begin to constrict the path. As the camera moves forward past the scaffolding, the bright commercial lights fade and the environment becomes increasingly enclosed. The scene then shifts into a cramped corridor of industrial debris, passing stacked wooden pallets, chain-link fencing, and trash bags that line the left side of the route. Finally, the atmosphere grows darker and more oppressive as the camera pushes deeper into the shadows of the construction site.
